Api._UseAuthBypassNote: Mirrors the API host's Authentication:Bypass flag. When true, CookieTokenAcquisitionService short-circuits and sends no Authorization header on outbound API calls — pointless to fetch a token since the API isn't validating in bypass mode. Must agree with API:Authentication:Bypass: false here + true on the API rejects every call with 401; true here + false on the API wastes a cookie lookup per call but still works. A startup validator refuses to boot with UseAuthBypass=true outside Development.

Authentication._BypassNote: Dev opt-in for ChuA.Authentication.DevBypass. When Bypass=true the library replaces the cookie/OIDC default scheme with a synthetic principal — browsers skip the Auth0 login redirect entirely in local dev. UserId matches the smoke admin seeded by TestData/sql/01_identity.sql; CompanyId is that admin's IsDefault membership (Acme Inc.). Flip Bypass=false (or wipe this whole block) to use real Auth0 OIDC.
